response.original_title: EMI Classics Archive David Oistrakh Violin Brahms
response.overview: Featuring great performances from legendary artists of the golden age, Classic Archive (TM), offers a unique historical glimpse into our classical heritage, presented on DVD for the very first time. Lovingly restored, using the finest state-of-the-art technology, these generous, full-length programmes include complete musical performances, comprehensive booklets on DVD-ROM and rare bonus footage.
response.tagline: "The main thing is not to lose your identity and to continue working"
response.title: EMI Classics Archive David Oistrakh Violin Brahms
